nodes.label: Iranian missile strikes on commercial vessels
Suspension of shipping operations through the Strait of Hormuz

edges.label: increases_risk
edges.why: Hormuz is a critical chokepoint for oil and LNG; disruption lifts supply risk premia.

edges.label: triggers
edges.why: Direct attacks on shipping can catalyze broader risk-off positioning across assets.

edges.label: pressures
edges.why: Higher oil prices worsen terms of trade for net importers and often pressure EM FX.

edges.label: widens
edges.why: Geopolitical shocks can increase uncertainty and push credit spreads wider.
